dex_note: Feeds on bananas and seafoam snacks between quests.
origin_story: A playful son of Hanuman and the mermaid Suvannamaccha, Macchanu bridges forest mischief and ocean magic in Thai versions of the Ramayana cycle.

lore_age: Folktale era, kept alive in local oral tradition
dex_note: Looks fierce, but this version mostly hoards shiny lotus seeds.
origin_story: Chalawan is the legendary crocodile lord from Phichit, famous for his magical cave and his clash with the hero Krai Thong.

name_th: พระอภัยมณี
locality: Rayong coast and Ko Samet imagination trail
dex_note: May accidentally lull an entire beach into nap mode.
origin_story: A romantic adventurer from Sunthorn Phu's epic poem, Phra Aphai Mani travels through sea kingdoms with a magical flute and a tender heart.

name_th: นางผีเสื้อสมุทร
dex_note: Keep snacks nearby if you hear dramatic waves.
origin_story: The powerful sea giantess of Phra Aphai Mani is often tragic and intense, but in this Mythidex she becomes a round, lonely ocean guardian.

lore_age: Likely late Ayutthaya literary tradition with older northern roots
dex_note: Has excellent hair and questionable field-trip judgment.
origin_story: Phra Lo is the handsome prince at the center of a northern romance, drawn onward by love, fate, and the famous golden peacock.

name_th: พระเพื่อน–พระแพง
lore_age: Likely late Ayutthaya literary tradition with older northern roots
dex_note: They absolutely coordinate outfits before any prophecy.
origin_story: The twin princesses of the Phra Lo romance are remembered for devotion and longing, here recast as a cheerful duo with synchronized blossom magic.

lore_age: Ancient Jataka-linked tale, performed across generations
dex_note: Leaves a trail of tiny bell sounds and confidence.
origin_story: Manora is a beloved half-bird heroine connected to southern Thai dance-drama, known for beauty, movement, and a story of love and return.

lore_age: Ancient Jataka-linked tale, performed across generations
dex_note: Will cross an entire map for one good reunion cutscene.
origin_story: Prince Suthon is Manora's devoted partner in the classic tale, wandering through trials to find and reunite with her.

name_th: หลวงปู่ทวด
lore_age: Historical monk of the 1500s, surrounded by later legend
dex_note: Turns stress into fresh water and a deep breath.
origin_story: Luang Pu Thuad is a revered southern monk-hero whose legends include miracles of compassion, protection, and turning seawater into drinkable water.
